series_metadata.series_description: To establish a process for supervision to obtain accurate and timely MARCS-generated reports through a MARCS Report Request Template. Per policy OSP-802.19, all MARCS Report Requests must be made by a supervisor and received from a supervisor''s personal GroupWise e-mail account.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in file at GHQ/TCS section one year current year ; Electronic: electronic copy in file on PC one year current year
